title: Guided Overview Focus Modes, Map Snapshot Capture, and Cleaner Planning Snapshot Report Builder

focus_mode_design.overview_entry_point: Added a Choose Review Focus workspace to Overview.
behavior: Selected focus mode is highlighted visually.
Focus panel shows concise focus-specific stats and caveats.
Recommended layer IDs are enabled conservatively when a focus mode is selected.
More layers / advanced options keeps full layer access available without making every tool equal-weight.

overview_clutter_reduction.summary: Overview now starts with the review question and focused stats before selected-parcel detail.
overview_clutter_reduction.development_activity_distinction: Development Activity is described as observed permit/new-construction/hotspot context, not prediction.
overview_clutter_reduction.model_research_distinction: Internal model research remains aggregate-only and is framed as governance/readiness context, not a live prediction map.

snapshot_object_design.storage: Frontend dashboard state and localStorage using the existing planning snapshot key.
snapshot_object_design.context_only_snapshots: Snapshot creation now works with no selected parcel; those snapshots are explicitly labeled as map/layer context only.

map_screenshot_capture_behavior.implementation: SceneView registers window.__cfsCaptureMapSnapshot while mounted and removes it on cleanup.
map_screenshot_capture_behavior.capture_api: Uses ArcGIS SceneView takeScreenshot when available.
map_screenshot_capture_behavior.timeout_guard: Overview snapshot save wraps screenshot capture with a 4500 ms timeout.
map_screenshot_capture_behavior.failure_behavior: If capture is unavailable, fails, or times out, the snapshot is still saved with mapScreenshotStatus and failure reason; no fake screenshot is generated.

planning_snapshot_changes.empty_state: Updated to direct users to choose a review focus in Overview, select parcel/layers, save snapshot, explain numbers, and print summary.
planning_snapshot_changes.snapshot_overview: Shows focus mode, active layers, map screenshot preview or unavailable placeholder, camera summary, and extent summary.

report_map_section.captured_state: Executive Summary includes the captured map image with a timestamp caption when available.
report_map_section.unavailable_state: Executive Summary shows a clean Map snapshot unavailable placeholder and failure reason when capture does not complete.

documentation_updates: README demo/product-mode description updated for guided focus modes and map snapshots.
Demo walkthrough updated for Choose Review Focus and map snapshot status.
Final demo checklist updated for focus-mode and map snapshot checks.
Two-minute script updated to describe focus modes and map image capture.
Higher-up speaking notes updated for guided focus and Planning Snapshot map context.

safety_verification.notes: Search found prediction terms only in aggregate model status/diagnostic hooks, not as parcel-level UI outputs.

smoke_test_results.browser_limitation: The in-app browser runtime intermittently timed out on right-panel clicks and screenshots. It verified the focus UI was present; the dev launcher and HTTP/API checks verified the app was serving correctly. A screenshot timeout guard was added after smoke testing showed ArcGIS screenshot capture could hang.

remaining_known_limitations: ArcGIS SceneView screenshot capture may fail or time out depending on browser/GPU/runtime state; the report now handles this safely with a placeholder and caveat.
Focus modes enable recommended layers but do not yet hide every unrelated advanced tool outside the right-panel guidance.
Planning Snapshot remains frontend/localStorage persistence only.
No automated screenshot capture dependency was added.
